summary: Iteration 2 backend-only testing for Sleda (Следа). Added /app/backend/tests/test_trip_lifecycle.py with 7 new tests covering full lifecycle (POST -> PATCH with route+markers+stats -> GET), PATCH with all 5 marker types (car/fish/mushroom/hazard/water), large route PATCH (150 points), invalid marker type rejection via PATCH, sorted list (started_at desc), and DELETE -> GET 404. Combined with the existing 14 tests, all 21/21 backend tests pass against EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://trace-fisher.preview.emergentagent.com. PATCH endpoint correctly accepts all fields (name, ended_at, route, markers, distance_m, duration_s), persists them, and excludes _id from responses.

minor.issue: Implementation filters out None values (`v is not None`) in addition to using exclude_unset. This means clients cannot explicitly null-out a field (e.g., reset ended_at to null). Not in scope of iteration 2; harmless for current flows.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py (160 lines) is clean: /api prefix, UUID ids via Field(default_factory), _id excluded via projection on all reads and on find_one_and_update, Literal-based MarkerType => 422 on invalid type.
PATCH uses find_one_and_update with return_document=True (returns updated doc) and projection={'_id': 0} -- correctly omits _id from response. Verified by tests.
Frontend /app/frontend/src/api/client.ts types (ApiTrip/ApiMarker/ApiRoutePoint) match backend Pydantic models exactly. updateTrip sends Partial<ApiTrip>, compatible with TripUpdate.
Minor: PATCH cannot explicitly set fields to null due to `v is not None` filter. Acceptable for current iteration.
seed_data_creation: All test trips prefixed TEST_ and cleaned up via test_zz_cleanup / test_zz_cleanup_iter2 fixtures (DELETE).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend stable. Two pytest files in /app/backend/tests/: test_trips.py (general CRUD) and test_trip_lifecycle.py (iteration 2: full lifecycle + large route + PATCH-based markers). Both use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Frontend (Expo web) was NOT tested per request (testing_type=backend only). Note expo.err.log shows 'Premature close' warnings (tunnel reconnects) but bundling succeeds.

tests_executed_iter2.TestTripFullLifecycle::test_lifecycle_po: PASS - POST creates empty trip, PATCH writes 25-pt route + 3 markers (car/fish/mushroom) + ended_at + distance_m=532.7 + duration_s=125; GET verifies persistence; no _id leak.
tests_executed_iter2.TestPatchAllMarkerTypes::test_patch_pers: PASS - PATCH with all 5 types (car/fish/mushroom/hazard/water) persisted; auto-generated UUIDs for each marker; verified via GET.
tests_executed_iter2.TestLargeRoutePatch::test_patch_large_ro: PASS - 150-point route + stats PATCHed and read back intact; first/last lat preserved; distance_m=1500.0, duration_s=300.
tests_executed_iter2.TestListSorted::test_list_sorted_desc_in: PASS - GET /api/trips sorted by started_at desc, no _id leak, includes all created ids.
tests_executed_iter2.TestDeleteThen404::test_delete_then_get_: PASS - DELETE returns {deleted:true}; subsequent GET=404; subsequent DELETE=404.
